# JobAlchemist

Official website: https://www.jobalchemist.tech/
Product app: https://app.jobalchemist.tech/
Contact: hello@jobalchemist.tech

## Tagline
Apply with clarity. Not hope.

## What JobAlchemist does
JobAlchemist is an AI-assisted application workflow that helps people analyse job ads, assess fit honestly, and tailor stronger CV and cover letter drafts with clear reasoning. It also supports student/early-career workflows and structured outplacement support for impacted employees.

## Who it is for
- Individual job seekers who want role-specific guidance instead of generic AI outputs.
- Students and first-job seekers who need clearer, confidence-building support.
- Teachers and schools (including NZ Gateway contexts) supporting student employability.
- HR and People leaders, plus advisers, supporting staff through restructure and transition.

## Core capabilities
- Job ad intelligence to surface hidden requirements and context.
- CV analysis focused on strengths, gaps, and recruiter-style clarity.
- Job-fit analysis with rationale and gap identification.
- Role-specific CV and cover letter drafting.
- Job-search workflow organisation across roles and versions.
- Student-adapted workflow and guidance for early-career applicants.
- Private, structured outplacement support to help impacted employees take immediate next steps.
